etymology.description: phonetic 此(cǐ, "this") + semantic 角(jiǎo, "horn") -> beak
etymology.interpretation: The character 觜(觜) (zuǐ, "beak") combines the phonetic component 此(此) (cǐ, "this") with the semantic component 角(角) (jiǎo, "horn") to convey the idea of a pointed projection, similar to a horn, representing a bird's beak.
